prompt:
The course involves analyzing the data, reviewing applications, and ___.

Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of standard English?

choices.rationale: Not parallel: a past-tense verb breaks the -ing pattern.
Not parallel: an infinitive breaks the list of -ing forms.
Not parallel: a present-tense verb breaks the -ing pattern.
Correct. The list uses -ing forms, so the third item must be parallel (also an -ing form).

explanation: Items in a series must share the same grammatical form; the first two are -ing forms, so the third must be too.
